SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.controller.strategy

Class TwoPlayerModeUIStrategy

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.strategy.TwoPlayerModeUIStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameModeUIStrategy
public class TwoPlayerModeUIStrategy extends Object implements GameModeUIStrategy
Two-Player Mode UI strategy implementation. Most logic is handled by TwoPlayerPanelManager, so this class provides minimal implementation.

Note: This class is currently not actively used in the codebase. Two-player mode UI management is primarily handled by TwoPlayerPanelManager. This class is retained for Strategy Pattern completeness and potential future extensions.

Design Note: The Strategy Pattern for UI management was designed but not fully integrated. Currently, UI updates are handled directly through GuiController methods rather than through strategy instances. This class exists to maintain architectural consistency and may be integrated in future refactoring.

Author:
Dong, Jia

Note: Reserved for Strategy Pattern completeness - not currently instantiated

    • initialize

      public void initialize(CommonUIManager commonUI)
      Initializes UI components for two-player mode. Currently, does nothing as UI is managed by TwoPlayerPanelManager.

    • onGameStart

      public void onGameStart()
      Called when a new two-player game starts. Currently, does nothing as game start logic is handled by TwoPlayerGameController.

    • updateLines

      public void updateLines(int lines)
      Updates the lines cleared display for two-player mode. Currently, does nothing as display updates are handled by TwoPlayerPanelManager.

      updateLines in interface GameModeUIStrategy
      Parameters:
      lines - the number of lines cleared
